xapiDependencies.purpose: Search available xAPI capabilities and actions for a user's goal.
Inspect action inputs, outputs, and usage constraints before planning calls.
Browse registered xAPI services when a dedicated action is not available.

examples.title: Find the right xAPI capability
examples.prompt: Which xAPI action should I use to research a Twitter/X profile and summarize recent posts?

examples.title: Build a call sequence
examples.prompt: Plan the xAPI calls needed to research a crypto token by address, including risk checks and summary output.

examples.title: Integration handoff
examples.prompt: Give me the xapi-to commands and expected outputs for a web news briefing workflow.
